title: PvP bow sound pack
description: A simple sound pack to change the default bow sounds by Hanzo's from Overwatch! Really pleasant for PvPers
body:
If you're a PvPer, you'll for sure like this one! You'll find the headshot sound and Hanzo's bow sound from Overwatch when using your bow in Minecraft.
This change is particularly good in combat, as the sound is much more adapted for this situation than the original sound.

Enjoy :)
